steps: Go to https://developers.pinterest.com/apps/ and log in with your Pinterest account
Fill in the application details: app name, company name, company website, privacy policy URL, and app purpose
Submit the form to request Trial access
Wait for an email notification — trial requests are reviewed each business day
Once approved, return to https://developers.pinterest.com/apps/ and open your app
Copy your App ID (Client ID) and App Secret (Client Secret)

credential_fields.name: client_id
credential_fields.label: App ID (Client ID)
credential_fields.description: Your Pinterest application App ID used as OAuth2 client_id

credential_fields.name: client_secret
credential_fields.label: App Secret (Client Secret)
credential_fields.description: Your Pinterest application App Secret used as OAuth2 client_secret

notes: Trial access must be manually approved by Pinterest — allow 1+ business day
Required scopes depend on use case: boards:read, boards:write, pins:read, pins:write, user_accounts:read
Apps start with Trial access (limited to 25 users); apply for Standard access for public-facing apps
Pinterest API v5 is the current version; v1/v3 are deprecated

test_endpoint.description: Retrieve the authenticated user's Pinterest profile
